name: gameplay_buttons
description: Two big tappable game buttons, one family, chunky rounded-square jewel buttons with thick gold rims: WIN — glossy emerald-green jewel button face with a radiant gold star emblem and one big sparkle; LOSE — identical button geometry with a muted slate-red jewel face and a cracked dark heart emblem.
prompt_extra: juicy, pressable, toy-like depth; identical silhouette and rim in both cells; emblem large and readable at 60px
